summary: A day that wanted the work done well.

voice_notes.notes: High achievement reads as caring about the quality of the thing you made today. Never flatten this into ambition; the texture matters.

signal_moments: the paragraph you rewrote three times
the small detail no one else would have caught
exemplars.output: The paragraph that no one had asked you to revise, you revised three times. The small detail you caught at the end, no one in the room would have noticed if you had let it go. You did not let it go. The day's small ledger was not about how much; it was about whether the small thing you handed over was good.
